detail: The occupancy test split is created once and used only for final evaluation.
Training price-gap features use 3-fold out-of-fold blended price predictions.
Test price-gap features are generated by price models fit only on occupancy training rows.
The XGB/HGB occupancy blend weight is tuned on a validation split from training data only.
The saved full-data price model is not used to create the experimental gap features.
